# Polyglot Chat

> A language-agnostic AI chatbot that detects your language and replies naturally, with threaded cloud-backed conversations.

Chat in any language. The assistant auto-detects the language you write in and responds in the same language, and can translate on request.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with feature overview and entry to the chat.
- [Chat](/chat): Authenticated chat interface. New visitors are redirected to sign in.
- [Sign in](/auth): Email/password and Google sign-in page.
